request.prompt: a members table where each row has a remove button

findings.message: Component 'dialog' is forbidden for intent 'destructive-action'.
findings.rationale: Dialog can be dismissed by clicking the overlay or pressing Escape, so a user can bypass a destructive confirmation without making a conscious choice. AlertDialog forces an explicit confirm/cancel decision and is announced with greater urgency by screen readers.

findings.message: Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.

findings.message: Forbidden descendant 'button' inside 'button' (at $.root.children[1].children[0].children[0]).
findings.rationale: Nested interactive elements create ambiguous click targets and are an accessibility violation: screen readers cannot determine intent and click handling varies across browsers.

repairMessages:
Your surface violates 55 governance rule finding(s) of the "shadcn/ui" design system:

Violation 1: [rule.destructive-requires-alertdialog / must]
  At: $.root.children[1] (component: dialog)
  Component 'dialog' is forbidden for intent 'destructive-action'.
  Why: Dialog can be dismissed by clicking the overlay or pressing Escape, so a user can bypass a destructive confirmation without making a conscious choice. AlertDialog forces an explicit confirm/cancel decision and is announced with greater urgency by screen readers.
Violation 2: [rule.alertdialog-requires-cancel / must]
  At: $.root.children[0].children[1].children[0].children[3].children[0] (component: alert-dialog)
  Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
  Why: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.
